texto: O friends I pray tonight Keep not your kisses for my dead cold brow. The way is lonely let me feel them now. Think gently of me I am travel-worn My faltering feet are pierced with many a thorn. Forgive! O hearts estranged forgive I plead! When ceaseless bliss is mine I shall not need The tenderness for which I long tonight.
explicacao: Citação de Belle Eugenia Smith sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “O friends I pray tonight Keep not your kisses for my dead cold brow. The way is lonely let me fee…” articula reflexao, forgiveness, tonight em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e viagem.
